message:
fix: add Skeleton loading state to StackSelector, standardize status color opacities (#5437)

- StackSelector: replace plain "Loading stacks..." text with Skeleton
  components for consistent loading UX
- Notification settings (Slack, OpsGenie, PagerDuty): use bg-*/20 for
  test result banners instead of non-standard bg-*/10
- HardwareHealthCard: use border-*/20 instead of border-*/30 to match
  canonical STATUS_COLORS system
- CloudEventsStatus: use bg-*/20 for status badges instead of bg-*/15
- StatsOverview: use getSeverityColors() from statusColors.ts instead
  of hardcoded color classes
- CardFactoryModal: remove redundant dark: variants from badge colors

Closes #5434
Closes #5435

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
